full_text:
Wei Jing (Ziqi)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Jing, styledZiqi, was born in Guangling. Close friend of Bu Zhi, he served Wu until 231. Sacked for questioning Pan Jun’s loyalty. Wei Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
